feed.title: SRAM RED AXS (road)
feed.subtitle: All generations of RED AXS road groupsets — derailleurs, shifters, RED power meters.

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RED-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.9
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RED-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.9

Part: RED24 1x RD

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - Minor Bugfix and reliability improvement.

Released: 2026-03-04

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RED-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.6
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RED-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.6

Part: RED24 1x RD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-15

entry.title: RED RD (RD-RED-E1) — firmware 2.54.4
entry.summary:
RED RD RD-RED-E1 — firmware 2.54.4

Part: Red24 2x

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported. - Future Product Support

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: RED FD (FD-RED-E1) — firmware 2.54.0
entry.summary:
RED FD FD-RED-E1 — firmware 2.54.0

Part: FD RED24

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version  before installing this Device Firmware Update.   This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: RED CONTROLLER (R) (EB-RED-D1) — firmware 2.53.2
entry.summary:
RED CONTROLLER (R) EB-RED-D1 — firmware 2.53.2

Part: EB R RED

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements.  This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-RED1-E-D1) — firmware 2.49.6
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-RED1-E-D1 — firmware 2.49.6

Part: RED RD MAX 44T

Released: 2024-10-05

RED RD RD-RED-E-D1 — firmware 2.41.0

Part: RD RED

General bug fixes and reliability improvements. General improvements to Ant+ gear position and battery status reporting.

entry.title: RED FD (FD-RED-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
RED FD FD-RED-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: FD RED

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-RED1-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-RED1-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: RED RD MAX 44T

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: RED RD (RD-RED-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
RED RD RD-RED-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: RD RED

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: RED CONTROLLER (R) (EB-RED-D1) — firmware 2.29.6
entry.summary:
RED CONTROLLER (R) EB-RED-D1 — firmware 2.29.6

Part: EB R RED

* Fixed bug: rapidly pressing Clics or Blips prevents derailleur(s) from actuating * Fixed bug: pressing and holding a brake-shift lever AXS button for an extended period can unpair shifter from system

Released: 2022-02-07

entry.title: RED CONTROLLER (R) (ED-RED-D1) — firmware 2.29.6
entry.summary:
RED CONTROLLER (R) ED-RED-D1 — firmware 2.29.6

Part: ED R RED

* Fixed bug: rapidly pressing Clics or Blips prevents derailleur(s) from actuating * Fixed bug: pressing and holding a brake-shift lever AXS button for an extended period can unpair shifter from system

Released: 2022-02-07

entry.title: RED CONTROLLER (R) (EB-RED-D1) — firmware 2.29.4
entry.summary:
RED CONTROLLER (R) EB-RED-D1 — firmware 2.29.4

Part: EB R RED

Battery life improvements – LED illuminates for a shorter period of time when shifter powers up with a low battery. eTap 11-speed derailleur compatibility added – RED and Force eTap AXS 12-speed shift-brake levers and eTap AXS BlipBox can now be paired with legacy eTap 11-speed front and rear derailleurs.

Released: 2021-12-02

entry.title: RED CONTROLLER (R) (ED-RED-D1) — firmware 2.29.4
entry.summary:
RED CONTROLLER (R) ED-RED-D1 — firmware 2.29.4

Part: ED R RED

Battery life improvements – LED illuminates for a shorter period of time when shifter powers up with a low battery. eTap 11-speed derailleur compatibility added – RED and Force eTap AXS 12-speed shift-brake levers and eTap AXS BlipBox can now be paired with legacy eTap 11-speed front and rear derailleurs.

Released: 2021-12-02

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-RED1-E-D1) — firmware 2.7.6
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-RED1-E-D1 — firmware 2.7.6

Part: RED RD MAX 44T

Additional product support.

Released: 2021-08-09

entry.title: RED RD (RD-RED-E-D1) — firmware 2.7.3
entry.summary:
RED RD RD-RED-E-D1 — firmware 2.7.3

Part: RD RED

Communication of gear and trim position to AXS app. Update sequential and compensating shift modes and persist across power cycle. Optimize motion control.

Released: 2020-06-12

entry.summary:
RED FD FD-RED-E-D1 — firmware 2.3.3

Released: 2020-06-12
